caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a dark vest stands behind a podium, addressing a seated audience in a room with vertical wooden slats on the walls. The audience consists of several people viewed from behind, including a man in a maroon shirt, a person in a yellow shirt, and individuals in blue and purple clothing. To the left of the speaker, another person is partially visible, looking down at a table. In the foreground, a white label with the text "ORCA" is visible on the shoulder of a person wearing a brownish-grey jacket. Across the frames, the scene remains largely static; the speaker remains at the podium, and the audience remains seated and attentive, with only minor shifts in posture and head positioning as they listen.
